# WeekLit (위클릿)

> WeekLit is a real-time Korean internet trend aggregator. It collects and ranks trending topics from 90+ sources including major Korean communities (DC Inside, FMKorea, Clien, TheQoo, etc.), news outlets, YouTube, government portals, and entertainment platforms. It provides cross-source trend detection, AI-powered summaries, and issue clustering.

## Main Pages

- [Home — Real-time Trending Issues](https://weeklit.net/)
- [Community Trends](https://weeklit.net/?category=community)
- [News Trends](https://weeklit.net/?category=news)
- [Tech Trends](https://weeklit.net/?category=tech)
- [YouTube Trends](https://weeklit.net/?category=video)
- [Portal Search Trends](https://weeklit.net/?category=portal)
- [Hot Deals](https://weeklit.net/?category=deals)
- [Movie Rankings](https://weeklit.net/?category=movie)
- [Music Rankings](https://weeklit.net/?category=music)
- [Performance/Exhibition Rankings](https://weeklit.net/?category=performance)
- [Government/Policy News](https://weeklit.net/?category=government)
- [Weather](https://weeklit.net/weather)
- [About](https://weeklit.net/about)

## Data

- Aggregates from 90+ Korean sources every 10 minutes
- Cross-source trend detection: identifies when topics appear across multiple platforms simultaneously
- AI-powered editorial summaries via Google Gemini
- Issue clustering groups related posts from different sources
- Scoring system ranks by engagement velocity, source diversity, and trend signals

## API

- Sitemap: https://weeklit.net/sitemap.xml
- RSS Feed: https://weeklit.net/api/feed/rss

## Contact

- Website: https://weeklit.net
- Service: WeekLit (위클릿) — 실시간 트렌드 모아보기
